purpose: Register adjacent GEO-related Skills that the PowerMatrix GEO Growth Orchestrator can route, inspect, or contract with. Paths are relative to powermatrix-geo-growth-orchestrator.

discovery_notes.note: The parent folder exists as Knowledge-Base-Builder and the actual Skill lives one level deeper.

skills.role: Build or refresh the brand single source of truth before GEO audit and content generation.
skills.when_to_call: Call when no reusable brand knowledge base exists, when the existing base is incomplete, or when the campaign depends on factual brand claims.
skip_conditions: existing_brand_profile is provided and passes required-field validation
user only requests workflow planning without artifact generation
skills.fallback_behavior: Create a minimal brand knowledge base contract with missing fields marked as 待确认; do not invent facts.

skills.role: Evaluate whether Doubao can understand, summarize, and recommend the brand or category content.
skills.when_to_call: Call when target_models includes doubao, when the customer needs Chinese AI search visibility diagnostics, or when dual-model comparison is required.
skip_conditions: user provides a fresh Doubao audit result covering the same keywords and probes
skills.fallback_behavior: Produce a Doubao manual-check plan and mark the Doubao stage as partial; do not present inferred findings as live model results.

skills.role: Evaluate DeepSeek-oriented brand understanding, recommendation readiness, and GEO content gaps.
skills.when_to_call: Call when target_models includes deepseek or when the workflow needs a structured DeepSeek visibility assessment.
skip_conditions: a current DeepSeek audit already covers the same scope
skills.fallback_behavior: Create a DeepSeek audit instruction set with expected artifacts and mark evidence as manual_check or inferred_estimate internally.

skills.role: Run API-based DeepSeek probing when credentials and runtime support are available.
skills.when_to_call: Call only when API-based live probing is explicitly enabled and credentials are available.
skip_conditions: the environment cannot call external APIs
skills.fallback_behavior: Use the non-API DeepSeek audit Skill or prepare manual probes; keep API status in internal audit only.

skills.role: Generate reusable GEO-friendly content assets from the brand knowledge base and content task plan.
skills.when_to_call: Call after the GEO Gap Matrix has been converted into a prioritized content task plan.
skip_conditions: brand_knowledge_base is missing required factual fields
skills.fallback_behavior: Generate a content brief and required-facts list instead of final content assets.

skills.role: Adapt GEO content assets into Zhihu Q&A, article, title, topic, and checklist drafts.
skills.when_to_call: Call for decision questions, comparison topics, FAQ-style explainers, and most consumer or B2B trust-building workflows.
skip_conditions: target_platforms excludes zhihu and routing rules do not recommend it
skills.fallback_behavior: Return a Zhihu-ready content brief and manual drafting checklist.

skills.role: Adapt GEO content assets into Toutiao articles, titles, summaries, keywords, cover prompts, and checklist drafts.
skills.when_to_call: Call for consumer education, local services, travel, food, boss-readable content, and broad-market explanation topics.
skip_conditions: target_platforms excludes toutiao and routing rules do not recommend it
topic is highly technical and better suited to CSDN or Juejin
skills.fallback_behavior: Return a Toutiao article outline, title set, and manual publishing checklist.

skills.role: Adapt technical GEO assets into CSDN tutorial, architecture, deployment, and solution articles.
skills.when_to_call: Call for AI, SaaS, developer tools, infrastructure, enterprise software, and technical implementation topics.
skip_conditions: industry is consumer, food, travel, medical beauty, or local service with no technical buyer angle
target_platforms excludes csdn and routing rules do not recommend it
skills.fallback_behavior: Keep CSDN as skipped and document why in the platform distribution plan.

skills.role: Adapt technical GEO assets into developer-community practice and toolchain articles.
skills.when_to_call: Call for developer tools, AI engineering, SaaS implementation, automation, and code-oriented content tasks.
skip_conditions: industry is consumer, food, travel, medical beauty, or local service with no developer angle
target_platforms excludes juejin and routing rules do not recommend it
skills.fallback_behavior: Keep Juejin as skipped and document why in the platform distribution plan.
